data.title: Inside Coinbase’s Texas Reincorporation: Business Courts, Derivative Hurdles and Crypto Policy
data.description:
On November 12, Coinbase announced that it had filed with the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission to reincorporate in Texas, with Foley & Lardner LLP serving as Texas counsel. After an interview with Foley & Lardner partners Christopher Babcock and Christopher Converse, the reasons Texas is gaining appeal as a corporate domicile come into clear focus. Texas’s […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/exclusives/after-coinbase-reincorporation-foley-partners-detail-why-texas-appeals-to-companies/

data.title: Bitcoin for taxes? Proposed bill would let Americans pay the IRS in BTC
data.description:

data.title: Kyrgyzstan launches gold-backed stablecoin USDKG
data.description:
The government of Kyrgyzstan has officially launched USDKG, a stablecoin backed by gold and pegged to the U. S. fiat currency. The authorities in Bishkek expect that the crypto, issued by a state-owned entity, will put the country on the map of global finances and attract investments. Kyrgyzstan to issue 50 million USDKG tokens on Tron […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/kyrgyzstan-launches-gold-backed-stablecoin-usdkg/

data.title: Trump's CFTC Pick, Mike Selig, Clears Hurdle on Way Toward Confirmation Vote
data.description:
Mike Selig, who has been nominated by former President Donald Trump to serve on the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), has successfully navigated a significant milestone in the confirmation process as he has cleared a crucial hurdle. This progress paves the way for him to potentially receive a vote for confirmation in the near future.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2025/11/20/trump-s-cftc-pick-mike-selig-clears-hurdle-on-way-toward-confirmation-vote

data.description:
